Package neqsim.pvtsimulation.util

Class GasPseudoCriticalProperties

java.lang.Object
neqsim.pvtsimulation.util.GasPseudoCriticalProperties
public final class GasPseudoCriticalProperties extends Object
Gas pseudocritical property correlations for natural gas mixtures.

Provides correlations to estimate pseudocritical temperature (Kelvin) and pressure (bara) of natural gas mixtures from gas specific gravity. These are essential inputs for corresponding-states correlations (Z-factor, viscosity, compressibility) when detailed composition is unavailable.

Default units: All public methods use Kelvin and bara. Internal correlation coefficients use Rankine and psia as published, with conversion at the API boundary.

Supported correlations:

  • Standing (1981) - simple correlation from gas specific gravity
  • Sutton (1985) - improved accuracy for wider range of gas gravities
  • Piper-McCain-Corredor (2012) - uses non-hydrocarbon mole fractions

Acid gas correction:

  • Wichert-Aziz (1972) - correction for H2S and CO2 content
Version:
2.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Method Details

    • pseudoCriticalTemperatureStanding

      public static double pseudoCriticalTemperatureStanding(double gammaG)
      Standing correlation for pseudocritical temperature (1981).

      Internally uses: $$ T_{pc} = 168 + 325 \gamma_g - 12.5 \gamma_g^2 \quad (\text{Rankine}) $$ then converts to Kelvin.

      Parameters:
      gammaG - Gas specific gravity (air = 1.0). Typical range: 0.55 - 1.8
      Returns:
      Pseudocritical temperature (Kelvin)

    • pseudoCriticalPressureStanding

      public static double pseudoCriticalPressureStanding(double gammaG)
      Standing correlation for pseudocritical pressure (1981).

      Internally uses: $$ P_{pc} = 677 + 15 \gamma_g - 37.5 \gamma_g^2 \quad (\text{psia}) $$ then converts to bara.

      Parameters:
      gammaG - Gas specific gravity (air = 1.0). Typical range: 0.55 - 1.8
      Returns:
      Pseudocritical pressure (bara)

    • pseudoCriticalTemperatureSutton

      public static double pseudoCriticalTemperatureSutton(double gammaG)
      Sutton correlation for pseudocritical temperature (1985).

      Internally uses: $$ T_{pc} = 169.2 + 349.5 \gamma_g - 74.0 \gamma_g^2 \quad (\text{Rankine}) $$ then converts to Kelvin.

      Parameters:
      gammaG - Gas specific gravity (air = 1.0). Valid range: 0.57 - 1.68
      Returns:
      Pseudocritical temperature (Kelvin)

    • pseudoCriticalPressureSutton

      public static double pseudoCriticalPressureSutton(double gammaG)
      Sutton correlation for pseudocritical pressure (1985).

      Internally uses: $$ P_{pc} = 756.8 - 131.0 \gamma_g - 3.6 \gamma_g^2 \quad (\text{psia}) $$ then converts to bara.

      Parameters:
      gammaG - Gas specific gravity (air = 1.0). Valid range: 0.57 - 1.68
      Returns:
      Pseudocritical pressure (bara)

    • pseudoCriticalTemperaturePiper

      public static double pseudoCriticalTemperaturePiper(double gammaG, double yH2S, double yCO2, double yN2)
      Piper-McCain-Corredor correlation for pseudocritical temperature (2012).
      Parameters:
      gammaG - Total gas specific gravity (air = 1.0)
      yH2S - Mole fraction of H2S [0, 1]
      yCO2 - Mole fraction of CO2 [0, 1]
      yN2 - Mole fraction of N2 [0, 1]
      Returns:
      Pseudocritical temperature (Kelvin)

    • pseudoCriticalPressurePiper

      public static double pseudoCriticalPressurePiper(double gammaG, double yH2S, double yCO2, double yN2)
      Piper-McCain-Corredor correlation for pseudocritical pressure (2012).
      Parameters:
      gammaG - Total gas specific gravity (air = 1.0)
      yH2S - Mole fraction of H2S [0, 1]
      yCO2 - Mole fraction of CO2 [0, 1]
      yN2 - Mole fraction of N2 [0, 1]
      Returns:
      Pseudocritical pressure (bara)

    • piperJK

      private static double[] piperJK(double gammaG, double yH2S, double yCO2, double yN2)
      Compute J and K Stewart-Burkhardt-Voo parameters using Piper-McCain-Corredor regression coefficients. All internal calculations in Rankine/psia.
      Parameters:
      gammaG - Total gas specific gravity (air = 1.0)
      yH2S - Mole fraction of H2S
      yCO2 - Mole fraction of CO2
      yN2 - Mole fraction of N2
      Returns:
      double array [J, K]

    • wichertAzizCorrection

      public static double[] wichertAzizCorrection(double tpcKelvin, double ppcBara, double yH2S, double yCO2)
      Wichert-Aziz correction for acid gas effects on pseudocritical properties.

      Corrects pseudocritical properties for the presence of H2S and CO2: $$ \varepsilon = 120 (A^{0.9} - A^{1.6}) + 15 (B^{0.5} - B^4) $$ where $A = y_{H_2S} + y_{CO_2}$ and $B = y_{H_2S}$.

      Parameters:
      tpcKelvin - Pseudocritical temperature (Kelvin)
      ppcBara - Pseudocritical pressure (bara)
      yH2S - Mole fraction of H2S [0, 1]
      yCO2 - Mole fraction of CO2 [0, 1]
      Returns:
      double array: [corrected Tpc (Kelvin), corrected Ppc (bara)]

    • pseudoReducedTemperature

      public static double pseudoReducedTemperature(double temperatureK, double tpcKelvin)
      Calculate pseudoreduced temperature.
      Parameters:
      temperatureK - Temperature (Kelvin)
      tpcKelvin - Pseudocritical temperature (Kelvin)
      Returns:
      Pseudoreduced temperature (dimensionless)

    • pseudoReducedPressure

      public static double pseudoReducedPressure(double pressureBara, double ppcBara)
      Calculate pseudoreduced pressure.
      Parameters:
      pressureBara - Pressure (bara)
      ppcBara - Pseudocritical pressure (bara)
      Returns:
      Pseudoreduced pressure (dimensionless)
